title: clerodendrum costatum
intro: Clerodendrum costatum, also known as the Yellow Bower Vine, is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, characterized by its clusters of yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Clerodendrum costatum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
